title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Citrus x aurantium, also known as bitter orange, essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains limonene, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the gut, which are common triggers for ulcerative colitis symptoms.
